input_text: Nak guna bilik air kat stesen KTM pun kena bayar. Dah la servis KTM lambat, tandas pun nak caj.
reason: Charged for KTM station toilet on top of poor train service frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Kemudahan tandas di stesen KTM patut percuma atau diselenggarakan dengan baik jika ada caj. Maklum balas boleh dihantar kepada Prasarana.

input_text: Every day stuck in traffic jam for 2 hours. My life is just work, traffic, sleep. Malaysian dream right?
reason: Sarcastic commentary on work-life balance ruined by traffic congestion.
suggested_rewrite: Long commutes affect quality of life significantly. Flexible work arrangements and better public transport could help Malaysian workers reclaim their time.

input_text: 邻居每天烧纸钱烟味很大。但是我不知道要怎么沟通这个敏感的话题。
reason: Sensitive complaint about neighbor burning joss paper affecting air quality, religious sensitivity.
suggested_rewrite: 邻里间的宗教习俗问题可以通过尊重的对话来解决。社区调解员可以帮助找到双方都能接受的方案。

input_text: Klinik 1Malaysia dah tutup semua. Lepas tu hospital kerajaan pun penuh. Rakyat kena pergi swasta tapi duit takde.
reason: Healthcare access gap after 1Malaysia clinic closures forcing expensive private options.
suggested_rewrite: Penutupan klinik komuniti menjejaskan akses kesihatan rakyat. Alternatif seperti klinik bergerak atau waktu operasi hospital yang dilanjutkan perlu dipertimbangkan.

input_text: This aunty selling nasi lemak RM12 now. Last year RM5. Increase more than double. Cannot accept la.
reason: Dramatic nasi lemak price increase exceeding 100%, staple food affordability concern.
suggested_rewrite: Significant food price increases should be monitored. If you feel pricing is unreasonable, compare options and report suspected profiteering to KPDNHEP.

input_text: Doktor kat klinik kerajaan hanya bagi 5 minit consultation. Macam mana nak explain masalah kesihatan dalam 5 minit?
reason: Rushed 5-minute consultations at government clinics preventing proper health discussion.
suggested_rewrite: Masa perundingan yang singkat mungkin disebabkan kekurangan doktor. Sistem temu janji dan lebih banyak doktor di klinik kerajaan boleh menyelesaikan isu ini.

input_text: The pedestrian crossing light only gives 10 seconds to cross a 6-lane road. Elderly people can't make it. Dangerous design.
reason: Inadequate pedestrian crossing time on wide road endangering elderly, safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: Pedestrian crossing timings should account for elderly and disabled users. Report unsafe crossings to the local traffic authority for timing adjustments.

input_text: Astro surcharge naik tapi half the channels show repeats. New content pun takde. Macam bayar untuk nothing.
reason: Pay TV cost increase with repetitive content, poor value complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Pelanggan berhak menilai nilai perkhidmatan. Pertimbangkan pelan alternatif atau perkhidmatan penstriman lain jika tidak berpuas hati.

input_text: 为什么马来西亚的宽带费那么贵但速度那么慢？邻国都比我们快。
reason: Broadband price-to-speed ratio unfavorable compared to neighboring countries.
suggested_rewrite: 宽带价格和速度的提升需要市场竞争和政府监管。MCMC的JENDELA计划旨在改善全国网络基础设施。

input_text: Kedai tayar ni caj RM50 untuk check angin je. Padahal free kat petrol station. Rompak siang hari.
reason: Tire shop overcharging for air pressure check that's free elsewhere.
suggested_rewrite: Semak tekanan tayar secara percuma di stesen minyak. Jika terpaksa ke kedai tayar, tanya harga dahulu sebelum bersetuju dengan perkhidmatan.

input_text: இந்த மாவட்டத்தில் பொது கழிவறைகள் மிகவும் குறைவு. பெண்களுக்கு மிகவும் சிரமம்.
reason: Lack of public toilets in the district particularly affecting women.
suggested_rewrite: பொது கழிவறைகள் குறிப்பாக பெண்களுக்கு போதுமான அளவில் இருக்க வேண்டும். உள்ளூர் அதிகாரிகளிடம் கோரிக்கை வைக்கலாம்.

input_text: Lift condo rosak lagi. Kali ni terperangkap 30 minit sebelum bomba datang. Budak kecik dalam lift menangis takut.
reason: Condo lift breakdown trapping people including scared children for 30 minutes.
suggested_rewrite: Lif yang kerap rosak memerlukan penggantian atau penyelenggaraan menyeluruh. Perangkap lif perlu dilaporkan kepada JKKP untuk siasatan keselamatan.

input_text: Graduate unemployment rate so high but government keep saying economy is growing. Growing for who exactly?
reason: Questioning who benefits from economic growth amid high graduate unemployment.
suggested_rewrite: Aligning economic growth with graduate employment requires industry-academia collaboration and skills development programs targeted at high-demand sectors.

input_text: 每次去Mydin买东西，收银台只开两三个。排队排到走廊。为什么不能多开几个？
reason: Supermarket insufficient checkout counters causing long queues.
suggested_rewrite: 超市应在高峰时段开放足够的收银台。自助结账系统也能帮助缩短排队时间。

input_text: Guna e-wallet kena charge extra 3%. Kerajaan suruh guna digital tapi peniaga caj lebih. Siapa rugi? Pengguna la.
reason: E-wallet surcharges contradicting government digital push, consumers lose.
suggested_rewrite: Caj tambahan untuk pembayaran digital oleh peniaga mungkin melanggar syarat penyedia e-wallet. Pengguna boleh melaporkan kepada Bank Negara.

input_text: The construction next door starts at 7am on Sundays. No rest day for residents. How is this allowed?
reason: Sunday morning construction noise violating residents' rest, regulatory complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Construction work on Sundays may violate local noise bylaws. Check with PBT about permitted construction hours and file a complaint if violated.

input_text: Nak claim insurans banjir pun susah. Rumah dah rosak teruk tapi company cakap tak covered. Buat apa bayar premium?
reason: Flood insurance claim rejection despite severe damage, questioning premium value.
suggested_rewrite: Semak polisi insurans anda dengan teliti untuk liputan banjir. Jika tuntutan ditolak tidak adil, eskalasi kepada Ombudsman Kewangan atau Bank Negara.

input_text: 这些摩托车骑手不戴头盔还闯红灯。出了事故还怪别人。交通法规形同虚设。
reason: Motorcyclists violating traffic rules with poor enforcement, safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: 交通法规的执行需要加强。自动执法系统如摄像头可以有效减少违规行为。

input_text: Kolej kediaman universiti penuh sesak. 4 orang satu bilik kecil. Macam mana nak study?
reason: Overcrowded university dorms with 4 students in small room, study environment concern.
suggested_rewrite: Kesesakan di kolej kediaman universiti menjejaskan pengalaman pembelajaran. Universiti perlu melabur dalam kemudahan penginapan yang lebih selesa.

input_text: MyDebit card reader at petrol station always broken. Force people to pay cash. Very inconvenient in cashless era.
reason: Broken card readers at petrol stations undermining cashless payment adoption.
suggested_rewrite: Petrol stations should maintain working payment terminals. Report non-functional card readers to the station management and Bank Negara if persistent.

input_text: Bas rapid tu selalu breakdown tengah jalan. Penumpang kena turun jalan kaki. Service yang memalukan.
reason: Rapid bus frequently breaking down mid-route forcing passengers to walk.
suggested_rewrite: Kerosakan bas yang kerap menunjukkan keperluan untuk penyelenggaraan dan penggantian armada. Aduan boleh disalurkan kepada Prasarana.

input_text: 这个地区的网络信号太差了。打电话都断断续续。运营商只关心城市用户。
reason: Poor network coverage in rural area, telcos only serving urban users.
suggested_rewrite: 农村地区的网络覆盖需要改善。政府的JENDELA计划旨在扩大全国网络覆盖范围。

input_text: Budak-budak remaja kat lorong belakang rumah ni selalu hisap vape. Umur baru 13-14 tahun. Mana enforcement?
reason: Underage vaping concern with 13-14 year olds, lack of enforcement.
suggested_rewrite: Penjualan vape kepada bawah umur adalah haram. Laporan boleh dibuat kepada KPDNHEP atau KKM untuk tindakan terhadap penjual yang melanggar.

input_text: The new MRT so expensive to ride daily. Monthly pass cost almost same as parking. Where's the incentive to use public transport?
reason: MRT pricing not competitive enough to incentivize public transport use.
suggested_rewrite: Public transport pricing should be competitive with driving costs to encourage ridership. Subsidized monthly passes could make MRT more attractive for daily commuters.

input_text: Rumah pangsa ni dah 30 tahun tapi takde renovation langsung. Cat pun dah hitam. Budaya tak jaga harta awam.
reason: 30-year-old flat never renovated, criticizing culture of not maintaining public property.
suggested_rewrite: Flat lama perlu program pembaharuan berkala. Penduduk boleh memohon dana penyelenggaraan melalui ADUN atau program perumahan kerajaan.

input_text: இங்கு மின்சார தடை அடிக்கடி ஏற்படுகிறது. உணவு எல்லாம் கெட்டுவிடும்.
reason: Frequent power outages causing food spoilage.
suggested_rewrite: அடிக்கடி மின்வெட்டு ஏற்படும் பகுதிகளுக்கு மின்சார விநியோக அமைப்பு மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். TNB க்கு புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: Bayar loan rumah 35 tahun tapi bank boleh rampas rumah kalau miss 3 bulan. System yang menindas rakyat.
reason: Housing loan system criticism about foreclosure after 3 missed payments on 35-year loan.
suggested_rewrite: Jika menghadapi kesukaran membayar pinjaman, hubungi bank segera untuk penyusunan semula hutang. AKPK menawarkan kaunseling kewangan percuma.

input_text: Food delivery apps charge 30% commission from small restaurants. How can small businesses survive? These apps are predatory.
reason: Delivery app commission rates hurting small restaurant businesses, predatory accusation.
suggested_rewrite: High delivery app commissions affect small business viability. Restaurant owners can explore alternatives like direct ordering systems or negotiate better commission rates.

input_text: 公立医院的药房每次都缺药。同一个药方要跑三家药房才能配齐。
reason: Government hospital pharmacy frequently out of stock, requiring visits to multiple pharmacies.
suggested_rewrite: 医院药房的供应管理需要改善。患者可以向医院管理层反映药品短缺问题。

input_text: Nak masuk university kerajaan susah sangat. SPM bagus pun tak dapat. System pilih ikut apa entah.
reason: University admission frustration despite good SPM results, questioning selection criteria.
suggested_rewrite: Kriteria kemasukan universiti kerajaan patut lebih telus. Pelajar yang layak boleh memohon rayuan atau meneroka universiti swasta dengan biasiswa.

input_text: Clinic appointment at 10am but doctor only came at 12. No apology, no explanation. We're just numbers to them.
reason: Doctor lateness without apology, feeling dehumanized by healthcare system.
suggested_rewrite: Patient wait times and doctor punctuality should be tracked and improved. Formal feedback to the clinic can help drive accountability.

input_text: Harga rumah kat Johor pun dah macam KL. Padahal gaji Johor jauh lebih rendah. Housing bubble nampaknya.
reason: Johor housing prices approaching KL levels despite lower wages, bubble concern.
suggested_rewrite: Harga rumah perlu sepadan dengan pendapatan tempatan. Kerajaan negeri boleh mengawal selia pembangunan dan memastikan rumah mampu milik mencukupi.

input_text: 这里的出租车司机开价太高了。从机场到市区要200块。这不是宰客是什么？
reason: Airport taxi overcharging, tourist exploitation complaint.
suggested_rewrite: 机场出租车应使用计价器或有固定价格表。如遇乱收费，记下车牌号向APAD投诉。

input_text: Bilik darjah panas gila. Fan pun tak cukup. Air cond lagi la tak ada. Macam mana budak nak focus belajar?
reason: Extremely hot classrooms with insufficient fans and no AC, affecting student focus.
suggested_rewrite: Persekitaran bilik darjah yang selesa penting untuk pembelajaran. Kipas tambahan atau sistem pengudaraan yang lebih baik perlu disediakan.

input_text: Grab driver cancel my ride 5 times in a row because my destination is 'too near'. Then surge pricing kicks in. System rigged.
reason: Multiple ride cancellations for short trips leading to surge pricing, unfair system.
suggested_rewrite: Ride cancellations for short trips should be addressed by the platform. Report repeated cancellations through the app's feedback system.

input_text: Jalan raya kat sini memang gelap malam-malam. Lampu jalan semua mati. Penagih dadah pun ramai kat sini.
reason: Dark roads with broken street lights creating unsafe environment, drug activity nearby.
suggested_rewrite: Jalan gelap meningkatkan risiko jenayah. Laporan kerosakan lampu jalan perlu dibuat kepada PBT dan isu keselamatan kepada polis untuk rondaan.

input_text: 每年缴那么多税，但路上到处是坑洞。纳税人的钱到底花在哪里？
reason: Tax burden vs pothole-ridden roads, questioning public spending.
suggested_rewrite: 道路维护应是公共开支的优先事项。市民可以通过公共咨询渠道了解基础设施预算的使用情况。

input_text: Bayar yuran persatuan penduduk tapi takde AGM langsung. Duit tu pergi mana? Pengurusan pun tak transparent.
reason: Residents' association fee with no AGM or transparency, fund misuse concern.
suggested_rewrite: Persatuan penduduk wajib mengadakan AGM dan mengemukakan penyata kewangan. Ahli boleh menuntut hak mereka untuk semakan akaun.

input_text: This hospital makes you pay deposit before treating emergency cases. Isn't that against medical ethics?
reason: Hospital requiring deposit for emergency treatment, ethical and legal concern.
suggested_rewrite: Emergency cases should not be delayed for payment. If a hospital demands deposits before treating emergencies, report to the Ministry of Health.

input_text: Paip air depan rumah bocor dah 3 bulan. Air bertakung jadi sarang nyamuk. Syabas cakap bukan jurisdiction diorang.
reason: Leaking water pipe for 3 months creating mosquito breeding ground, jurisdiction blame game.
suggested_rewrite: Paip air bocor perlu pembaikan segera kerana risiko kesihatan. Hubungi SPAN untuk menentukan pihak yang bertanggungjawab jika berlaku kekeliruan.

input_text: வீட்டு வாடகை மிகவும் அதிகமாக உள்ளது. சம்பளத்தின் பாதிக்கும் மேல் வாடகைக்கே போய்விடுகிறது.
reason: Rent consuming more than half of salary, cost of living crisis.
suggested_rewrite: வீட்டு வாடகை சம்பளத்தின் 30% க்கும் குறைவாக இருக்க வேண்டும் என பரிந்துரைக்கப்படுகிறது. குறைந்த வாடகை வீடுகள் அல்லது வாடகை கட்டுப்பாட்டு கொள்கைகள் தேவை.

input_text: Aku nak jual rumah tapi bank valuation jauh lebih rendah dari harga pasaran. Macam mana nak untung? System memang tak sokong rakyat.
reason: Bank property valuation below market price frustrating seller.
suggested_rewrite: Penilaian bank mungkin berbeza daripada harga pasaran. Mendapatkan beberapa penilaian bebas dan bekerja dengan ejen hartanah berpengalaman boleh membantu.

input_text: Strata title for my apartment still not issued after 10 years. Developer ghosted. What protection do buyers have?
reason: 10-year wait for strata title with unresponsive developer, buyer protection concern.
suggested_rewrite: Developers are legally required to issue strata titles within a timeframe. File a complaint with the Commissioner of Buildings and consider legal action through the Housing Tribunal.

input_text: Air conditioner di pejabat kerajaan sejuk gila tapi kat counter tak ada aircond. Yang kerja kat counter tu bukan orang ke?
reason: Government office AC imbalance, cold in offices but hot at service counters.
suggested_rewrite: Keselesaan semua kawasan kerja termasuk kaunter perkhidmatan perlu diambil kira dalam pengurusan bangunan kerajaan.

input_text: 这些补习中心广告说保证成绩提高。结果孩子成绩没变。钱也退不回来。
reason: Tuition center false advertising about guaranteed improvement, money not refunded.
suggested_rewrite: 夸大宣传的补习中心可以向消费者法庭投诉。报名前应要求书面的退款政策。
